steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: The underlined word is "supported" in "the old Panhandle bridge, supported by massive sandstone pillars." In this architectural context, the pillars physically bear the weight of the bridge from below.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The word "supported" needs to mean what sandstone pillars do to a bridge: bear its weight. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Nurtured: cared for, fostered growth — this applies to living things or ideas, not stone pillars holding up a bridge. ✗
  • Choice B — Endorsed: approved or recommended — this is about opinions, not physical load-bearing. ✗
  • Choice C — Held up: physically bore the weight of — pillars hold up a bridge's deck and structure. ✓
  • Choice D — Improved on: made better — pillars don't improve a bridge; they structurally support it. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
